description: dirk_lib library-level settings. Controls global theming, localization, and other shared defaults used by every resource that depends on dirk_lib.

appearance.description: Global UI theme and branding shared across every dirk_lib-powered NUI.

primaryColor.description: Mantine palette key used as the UI primary colour. Use 'dirk' to apply the custom palette defined below.

primaryShade.description: Mantine shade index (0 lightest, 9 darkest) picked from the primary palette for buttons, borders, and accents.

customTheme.description: Ten-colour palette (light to dark) used when primaryColor is set to 'dirk'. Provide exactly ten hex codes ordered from lightest shade to darkest.

serverName.description: Server branding string displayed in NUIs that surface a server name.

logo.description: URL or nui:// path to the server logo shown in dirk_lib-powered menus.

localization.description: Language and currency defaults used by every dirk_lib consumer.

language.description: Locale code used when resolving strings from /locales.

currency.description: Currency symbol prefixed to money values rendered by dirk_lib UIs.
